opportunities.title: [OSS] tanmaytyagii/amazon-clone-nextjs: [GOOD FIRST ISSUE] Implement Loading Spinner for Product Fetching
opportunities.description:
## 🚀 Beginner Friendly Task

Implement a simple loading spinner while products are being fetched from the API.

---

## 📌 Requirements

- [ ] Add loading spinner component
- [ ] Display spinner during API requests
- [ ] Ensure smooth UX during page load
- [ ] Keep styling consistent with current UI

---

## 🛠 Suggested Stack
- React Loading Spinner
- TailwindCSS

---

## 📷 Expected Outcome
Users should see a smooth loading experience instead of blank sections during data fetching.

---

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria

- Spinner should appear during API requests
- No layout shift during loading
- Com

opportunities.title: [OSS] elitol770/pilpul: Improve keyboard navigation in the session room
opportunities.description:
Goal
Make the session room easier to use without a mouse.

Areas to check
- PDF/text panel controls
- Notebook textarea
- AI third seat controls
- End session and report actions

Acceptance criteria
- All important controls are reachable by keyboard.
- Focus states are visible but visually restrained.
- Tab order follows the visible layout.
- No private data or API keys are added to test fixtures.

opportunities.title: [OSS] elitol770/pilpul: Review and improve empty states
opportunities.description:
Goal
Make empty states calm, useful, and consistent.

Screens to review
- Home with no active pairing
- Queue while waiting
- Open requests with no matches
- Notebook with no history
- Maintainer dashboard with no reports

Acceptance criteria
- Each empty state has one clear next action or says there is nothing to do.
- Copy stays plain and quiet.
- No extra cards, decoration, feeds, or fake activity are added.

opportunities.title: [OSS] elitol770/pilpul: Clarify BYOK AI privacy copy
opportunities.description:
Goal
Make it unmistakable what happens when a user invokes the AI third seat.

The copy should clarify
- The user supplies their own provider key.
- Pilpul does not store the key on the server.
- The selected provider receives the prompt, notebook excerpt, and sometimes the PDF URL or selected passage.
- Remembering the key is optional and device-local.

Acceptance criteria
- Copy is short enough to fit the AI panel.
- It is accurate for Anthropic, OpenAI, and compatible providers.
- It does not use hype or fear language.

opportunities.title: [OSS] elitol770/pilpul: Polish the mobile session-room layout
opportunities.description:
Goal
Improve the room on phone-sized screens so reading and note-taking feel steady.

Look at
- Text/PDF and notebook switching
- Toolbar spacing
- AI panel height
- Video or voice controls
- Long titles and partner names

Acceptance criteria
- No text overlaps at narrow widths.
- The notebook remains comfortable to type in.
- The PDF/text area remains readable.
- Styling stays within Pilpul's quiet paper-and-ink aesthetic.

opportunities.title: [OSS] proompteng/bilig: docs(agent): add Pydantic AI WorkPaper tool recipe
opportunities.description:
## Why

Pydantic AI users need a concrete example of a typed tool that returns calculated spreadsheet output. Bilig should have a simple copy-paste recipe for that audience.

## Scope

Add a TypeScript-first docs recipe for a WorkPaper tool with typed input and typed result. If a Pydantic AI example is not practical in TypeScript, keep the page framed as an interop recipe: the agent calls a TypeScript WorkPaper endpoint and receives JSON.

Suggested files:

- `docs/agent-workpaper-tool-calling-recipe.md` or a new docs page if the existing pattern prefers one page per framework
- `examples/head

opportunities.title: [OSS] digitalgroundgame/pragmatic-papers: Component tests for block components
opportunities.description:
## Goal
Add React Testing Library component tests for block `Component.tsx` files in `src/blocks/`.

## Prerequisites
Complete #670 first — the global mocks added to `vitest.setup.ts` (next/image, next/link, RichText) are required here too.

## Scope
- `Banner/Component.tsx` — styled alert with info/warning/error/success variants
- `CallToAction/Component.tsx` — heading, description, and button(s)
- `Code/Component.tsx` — syntax-highlighted code block with copy button
- `Content/Component.tsx` — rich text content block
- `Contributors/Component.tsx` — author/contributor list
- `Footnote/Compon

opportunities.title: [OSS] digitalgroundgame/pragmatic-papers: Component tests for hero components
opportunities.description:
## Goal
Add React Testing Library component tests for all hero variants in `src/heros/`.

## Scope
- `HighImpact/index.tsx` — full-screen hero with overlay, text, links, and background media
- `MediumImpact/index.tsx` — mid-height hero with heading and media below text
- `LowImpact/index.tsx` — minimal inline hero with constrained text content
- `PageHero/index.tsx` — page header with optional children or rich text
- `ArticleHero/index.tsx` — article header with title, author links, publication date, and optional narration player
- `RenderHero.tsx` — router component dispatching to the above v
